arts.ttl: Southampton appoint Juric as new manager
arts.sum: Southampton appoint ex-Roma boss Ivan Juric as their new manager on an 18-month deal.

arts.ttl: “He didn’t like it” – Southampton player explains why Russell Martin left him out, receives assurance from Saints
arts.sum: Southampton were one of the three clubs to return to the Premier League this season and Russell Martin was instrumental in helping them secure promotion. Southampton are currently at bottom of the table and parted ways with the manager last weekend. Russell Martin’s exit could help Armel Bella-Kotchap regain his place at St Mary’s. arts.ttl: “I don’t have a precise explanation” – Southampton player on confusion over transfer failure
arts.sum: Southampton’s Armel Bella-Kotchap had an opportunity to join TSG Hoffenheim in the summer window. The operation was advanced, and the 23-year-old travelled to Germany to carry out medical tests. The transfer didn’t go through due to an issue that arose during his medical examinations and Hoffenheim decided to pull the plug. arts.sum: Fulham take on bottom-of-the-table Southampton in the Premier League on Sunday. Preview including team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano: Fulham receive transfer proposal for 'untouchable' Andreas Pereira
arts.sum: Fulham receive an 'initial proposal' from South American giants Palmeiras over a potential deal to sign midfielder Andreas Pereira.

arts.ttl: Southampton confirm Ivan Juric appointment: Will the 49-year-old be in charge vs. Fulham?
arts.sum: Southampton confirm the appointment of former Roma head coach Ivan Juric as their new manager following the departure of Russell Martin.

arts.ttl: Ivan Juric makes ‘aggressive’ promise following Southampton appointment
arts.sum: Ivan Juric has outlined what to expect from his Southampton side after he was officially unveiled as manager on Saturday. The 49-year-old succeeds Russell Martin in the dugout with the club bottom of the Premier League table on five points having won one game out of 16. arts.sum: Andreas Pereira’s good relationship with Palmeiras president Leila Pereira is seen as key to the Brazilian side’s hopes of signing him in January. That’s according to UOL, who say Leila has become the club’s ‘asset’ as they try to get the midfielder out of Fulham. arts.ttl: Southampton name Ivan Juric as new head coach
arts.sum: Southampton confirmed the hiring of Ivan Juric as their new head coach on Saturday ahead of their clash with Fulham on Sunday.
